untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) consensus sentiment percentile from media/analyst/retail positioning data (not available in indicator set), (2) central bank announcement detection and timing (not available as indicator), and (3) trader conviction scoring (subjective, non-quantifiable). The core thesis—reversal against consensus and CB interventions—cannot be fully operationalized with only price/technical indicators. Provided proxy entry using price_pos_20 as sentiment extreme, but this is insufficient for the intended strategy.
translation_notes: SCHWAGER_DRY_0_2 is a discretionary reversal strategy built on fundamental/macro inputs (consensus, CB policy) rather than technical indicators. Attempted to represent 'extreme bullish positioning' via price_pos_20 > 0.8 (price near 20-bar high), and exit on pivot reversal as proxy for conviction invalidation. Stop loss set to 3% per specification. However, without sentiment/announcement feeds, this translation significantly compromises signal fidelity. Recommend: (1) Add external data feeds for consensus/positioning, (2) Implement calendar for CB announcements, or (3) Classify as MANUAL_DISCRETIONARY rather than automated backtest.
